comments.author: @Logith-p6b
comments.text:
I think combination of both on grid and off grid is best for home purpose in cities because if you use heavy load(2 or more AC,mixer, grinder,etc) for a short or particular duration then on grid will be supported. If the power is shuted down then you will use a minimum loads like fan,light,TV. In that condition off grid is best
      Show as an electrical engineering student my suggestion is keep a switcher circuit if the battery is charged fully with the help of solar panel then the solar panel is transferred or changed to the on grid system inverter. 
Or
Keep 70 % of solar panel to off grid and 30 % of solar panel to on grid
